name: ETOS-LLM-Studio
desc: A native LLM client for iOS & Apple Watch. Run local GGUF models offline via llama.cpp, or connect to OpenAI/Claude/Gemini. Features local RAG, Model Context P…
descFull: A native LLM client for iOS & Apple Watch. Run local GGUF models offline via llama.cpp, or connect to OpenAI/Claude/Gemini. Features local RAG, Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, Siri Shortcuts, and cross-device sync. Built with Swift.
